summary: Tested Vendor Combobox feature in Spare Parts - all flows verified working. Backend 5/5 tests pass. UI flows: vendor combobox trigger, dropdown with search, vendor selection, inline Add Vendor form with Create & Select, vendor name in table, edit modal pre-selection, and legacy supplier fallback.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Vendor_UI_Test vendor (9800099999) and TEST_Part_VendorSave2 part via UI testing. Not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spare Parts page: VendorCombobox component fully working. Vendor items in dropdown are `<button>` elements (no data-testid on individual items). Selector: `[data-testid="vendor-dropdown"] button:not([data-testid="add-new-vendor-btn"])`. Inline form data-testids: add-vendor-inline-form, new-vendor-name, new-vendor-phone, save-new-vendor-btn. Toast on vendor creation: 'Vendor created and selected!'. Legacy supplier field (p.supplier) falls back correctly in table. Edit modal title: 'Edit Part' (not 'Add Spare Part'). Part `Break soe` has legacy supplier='Amba' (no vendor_id) and shows correctly in table with store icon.

flows_tested.vendor_item_selection: PASS - closes dropdown and shows vendor name in trigger
flows_tested.inline_add_new_vendor_form: PASS - blue form with Vendor Name, Phone, Address fields
flows_tested.create_and_select: PASS - toast shows 'Vendor created and selected!', auto-selects
flows_tested.table_supplier_column: PASS - shows vendor_name with store icon
flows_tested.edit_modal_preselects_vendor: PASS - Honda Jorpati pre-selected for Brake Pad
flows_tested.legacy_supplier_fallback: PASS - Break soe shows Amba (legacy supplier text) with store icon
flows_tested.get_spare_parts_returns_vendor_name: PASS - batch enriched from vendors collection
